name: WebEngage Customer Engagement API
what_it_does: Customer engagement and retention platform with REST API — enabling personalized multi-channel campaigns (push, in-app, email, SMS, WhatsApp) based on behavioral analytics, segmentation, and journey automation for consumer apps and e-commerce companies in emerging markets.
use_cases: Sending targeted push notifications and in-app messages via WebEngage REST API
Syncing user attributes and custom events from mobile or web apps for segmentation
Triggering automated customer journeys based on lifecycle events via API
Querying campaign analytics and engagement metrics for retention reporting
Managing user opt-in and opt-out preferences for notification compliance
not_for: B2B email marketing and outbound sales sequences (use HubSpot or Outreach)
B2C companies with purely desktop web audience (WebEngage is mobile-first)
Enterprise marketing clouds with Adobe or Salesforce ecosystem requirements
best_when: A consumer app or e-commerce company in India, Southeast Asia, Middle East, or Africa wants affordable multi-channel engagement (push, in-app, email, SMS, WhatsApp) with behavioral personalization.
avoid_when: You need enterprise marketing cloud integration, B2B sales automation, or your audience is primarily desktop without mobile app.

auth.notes: API secret key from WebEngage dashboard. Passed as Authorization header (Bearer token). License code required as part of API path for some endpoints. No OAuth2. Webhook for event callbacks. Mobile SDKs for push and in-app delivery.

pricing.paid_tiers: Startup from $199/month; Growth custom; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Indian company (Mumbai). Founded 2011. Raised $20M. Strong in India, Southeast Asia, Middle East. 400+ global brands. WhatsApp Business integration differentiator. Multi-channel: push, in-app, email, SMS, WhatsApp, web push. Journey Designer for automation. Emerging markets focus with competitive pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API secret key

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for users, events, campaigns, and notifications. Bearer token auth. License code in API path for user management. Good documentation. Mobile SDKs for push delivery. Campaign sending via API possible. User attribute sync key for data ingestion. WhatsApp requires Business API setup.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User reads idempotent by user ID. Event tracking is append-only — not idempotent by content. Campaign reads idempotent. User attribute updates idempotent by user ID.
known_agent_gotchas: License code (account key) required in URL path for user management — not just auth header
Event tracking is append-only — duplicate event tracking creates duplicate records
WhatsApp Business API requires separate WhatsApp Business Account setup
Mobile SDK required for in-app messaging — server API cannot deliver in-app messages
India-based company — data residency defaults to India unless EU/US region specified

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. India, US, and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. User behavioral data is sensitive PII — implement consent management. Push notification tokens are sensitive — secure mobile SDK implementation. India-based with emerging market compliance.
